description: Directed service dependency graph. An edge {from: A, to: B} means A calls B. The `resolver` field names the DNS resolver each service uses to resolve hostnames at request time; `external_hosts` lists the external hostnames it must resolve per request. `static_addressing` true means the service reaches its dependencies by static IP / hostAliases and does not perform per-request DNS lookups.

resolvers.name: dns:coredns-cluster
resolvers.note: cluster DNS Service (kube-dns); 3 CoreDNS pods behind one ClusterIP; in-cluster + external name resolution

services.name: metrics-relay
services.note: reaches collector via hostAliases static IP; no per-request DNS

services.name: image-proxy
services.note: NodeLocal DNS cache; single long-lived cached upstream connection, resolved once at startup
